functions.name: Curl_HMAC_init
functions.embedding_summary: Initializes an HMAC context by allocating memory, processing the key according to HMAC specifications, and setting up two hash contexts with inner and outer padding.

predicted_labels.high_level_purpose: Initializes an HMAC context by allocating memory, processing the key according to HMAC specifications, and setting up two hash contexts with inner and outer padding.

functions.name: Curl_HMAC_update
functions.embedding_summary: Updates an HMAC context by feeding data to the first hash calculation.

predicted_labels.high_level_purpose: Updates an HMAC context by feeding data to the first hash calculation.

functions.name: Curl_HMAC_final
functions.embedding_summary: Finalizes an HMAC computation by performing the final hash operations and cleaning up the context structure.

predicted_labels.high_level_purpose: Finalizes an HMAC computation by performing the final hash operations and cleaning up the context structure.

functions.name: Curl_hmacit
functions.embedding_summary: Computes an HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) using the provided key and data, storing the result in the output buffer.

predicted_labels.high_level_purpose: Computes an HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) using the provided key and data, storing the result in the output buffer.
